hooks.command: bash -c '[ "$TERMINAL_EMULATOR" != "JetBrains-JediTerm" ] && exit 0; INPUT=$(cat); P=$$; while [ "$P" != "1" ]; do P=$(ps -o ppid= -p "$P" 2>/dev/null | xargs); [ -z "$P" ] && exit 0; [ -f ~/.terminal-watcher/ports/"$P".port ] && { PORT=$(cat ~/.terminal-watcher/ports/"$P".port); echo "$INPUT" | curl -s -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/event?tool=claude" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d @-; exit 0; }; done'

bash -c '[ "$TERMINAL_EMULATOR" != "JetBrains-JediTerm" ] && exit 0; INPUT=$(cat); P=$$; while [ "$P" != "1" ]; do P=$(ps -o ppid= -p "$P" 2>/dev/null | xargs); [ -z "$P" ] && exit 0; [ -f ~/.terminal-watcher/ports/"$P".port ] && { PORT=$(cat ~/.terminal-watcher/ports/"$P".port); echo "$INPUT" | curl -s -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/event?tool=claude" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d @-; exit 0; }; done'
